name: My little pony RPG
description:
My little pony world because why not. Should I do Hxh world next?

I give up making proper description for bots😮‍💨

This is biblically accurate MLP world. Basically it's a free world, do whatever you want to do, it's up to you to decide where and how you spawn into the world, what species you are, who's your family and what's your role in society.

A reminder that this bot has a lot of descriptions and it might not work so well with janitor, if it doesn't respond or if it speaks for you or if it forgets lore that's not my fault!!

Regardless of using janitor or openai, for the 'bot forgets plot' problem, I might as well recommend you use the 'chat memory' feature, just add there your oc descriptions and a summary of your history and it should be good to go. If that doesn't work either, then good luck figuring out.

BTW ENGLISH IT'S NOT MY FIRST LANGUAGE

To clear up some confusion, I am a MAN✨
creator: PresumedDress
